prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主 榜约第36–38名，近年排名稳定，非985但工科实力突出；近年声誉评价中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第65（一般），综合热度约47.2万，曝光量 中等；未见投档断档记录；化学工程与技术A+、光学工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科，兵器科学与技术为传统王牌，与招生专业 高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，南京理工大学在上述领域均有强势学科布局；本省2026年考生总数约53.5万，较2 025年物理类+历史类合计约46.3万明显增加，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划小幅缩招及本省考生大幅增加，在2025 年基准9704名基础上预计竞争加剧；预测最低位次约9681名，区间9181–10181名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 电子信息类（含通信工程、电子科学与技术等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 兵器类（含武器系统与工程、弹药工程与爆炸技术）
- 机械类（含机械工程、车辆工程、工业工程）
- 探测制导与控制技术
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（含材料科学与工程、材料物理等）
- 工商管理类（含会计学、人力资源管理）
- 工程力学
- 工业设计
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间9181–10181名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如低于9181名）可重点冲击计算机类、电子信息类等一档王 牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如高于10181名）建议以三档专业稳妥填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 10437→9834→11205→9704, fluctuating within the 9700–11200 range in the past four years, with a 2025 baseline of about 9704, at a recent low; provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 158 in 2022, 159 in 2023, 160 in 2024, 160 in 2025; 2026 plan 158, a slight reduction of 2 compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 36–38, stable in recent years, not 985 but with outstanding engineering strength; recent reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 65 (average), comprehensive popularity about 472,000, medium exposure; no record of enrollment gaps; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Optical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, total 4 A- and above disciplines, Armament Science and Technology is a traditional trump card, highly related to enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended; Nanjing University of Science and Technology has strong discipline layouts in the above fields; provincial 2026 total examinees about 535,000, a significant increase from the 2025 physics + history total of about 463,000, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, a slight reduction in 2026 plan, and a significant increase in provincial examinees, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 9704; predicted minimum ranking about 9681, range 9181–10181.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information Category (including Communication Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, etc.)
- Automation Category (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Armament Category (including Weapon Systems and Engineering, Ammunition Engineering and Explosion Technology)
- Mechanical Category (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering)
- Detection, Guidance and Control Technology
- Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Category (including Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Physics, etc.)
- Business Administration Category (including Accounting, Human Resource Management)
- Engineering Mechanics
- Industrial Design
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range of 9181–10181, it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors as the main force, Tier 1 majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 9181), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 trump card majors such as Computer and Electronic Information; if ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 10181), it is recommended to fill in Tier 3 majors safely.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 4264 → 4393 → 4379 → 4584, showing a general backward trend in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 320 places over the past 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 4584; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 21 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 31, a significant expansion of 11 places (+55%) compared to 2025, greatly increasing admission opportunities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 36–38, a science and engineering university with relatively marginal liberal arts programs; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average; no records of enrollment gaps; NJUST's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Optical Engineering A-, etc.), with no A-class discipline support for liberal arts programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors (English, Japanese, Social Work, Public Administration) have stable social popularity, with no obvious signs of warming; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is approximately 535,000, a significant increase from about 178,000 history category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, and the increase in provincial candidates, the expansion effect increases admission opportunities, but the enlarged candidate pool partially offsets the expansion dividend; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6047, with a range of 5547–6547.
